title: bulbophyllum obliquum
intro: Bulbophyllum obliquum, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, particularly in India, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum obliquum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots in water to create a decoction, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
